title: Windjammer: The Voyage of the Christian Radich
director: Bill Colleran, Louis De Rochemont III
actors: Bjørn Amvik, Arne Andersen, Per Antonsen
plot: Windjammer, the first presentation in CINEMIRACLE, is the record of a training cruise of the full-rigged S/S Christian Radich from Oslo across the Atlantic, through the Caribbean, to New York and back home again.
